attributes.action: Push for mental health services, because a lot of people really need support.
attributes.additional_details: It is imperative that we comprehend the profound impact of mental health across all demographics. Enhanced education and awareness are crucial, as a transformative shift is urgently required. We currently face significant challenges, including insufficient diagnostic resources, extended waiting periods, missed opportunities to provide essential medication, and an overwhelming demand for counseling and support services. Implementing systemic changes is critical to preserving lives.
attributes.background: Advocate for mental health services!  We need more money, facilities, and support workers. People are suffering immensely and often turning to suicide. Please advocate for this invisible illness. We need more funding to support the vulnerable.  #MentalHealth #Support #Funding #Advocacy #Awareness

rejection.details: It is not clear from the text of the petition exactly what the Government is being asked to do beyond what it already states its intention is.
